case_title: UPLEVEL OPS, LLC ET AL VS. WELLS FARGO BANK

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM DEFENDANT GRANTED*
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: CSC - LAWYERS INCORPORATING SERVICE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF UPLEVEL OPS, LLC LUGONES, ELIZABETH AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-15-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK
DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY UPLEVEL OPS, LLC LUGONES, ELIZABETH AS TO DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-01-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR TIFFANY WARD IS APPEARING ON BEHALF OF WELLS FARGO BANK. FILED BY DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SARAH A. TRISSEL, BOOKKEEPER/PAYROLL. FILED BY PLAINTIFF UPLEVEL OPS, LLC

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF UPLEVEL OPS, LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY SARAH A. TRISSER. PLAINTIFF ELIZABTH LUGUNES IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY TIFFANY WARD (BUSINESS EXECUTION CONSULTANT) VIA ZOOM. COURT FINDS WELLS FARGO BANK IS NOT THE PROPER DEFENDANT IN THIS CASE. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MURLENE J. RANDLE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
